falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,150 on any single day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break of the August 2024 low invalidates the 79% bottom pattern match, proving this is not a repeat of that structure and the 'bottom' call is wrong

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained panic-level volatility contradicts a bottoming formation; the blowoff score of 39 suggests controlled fear, but persistent VIX >35 indicates genuine systemic stress, not a local bottom

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury spread inverts further below -50bps (more negative than -0.50%)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Deepening inversion signals accelerating recession risk, which would override the pattern match by proving macro deterioration is worsening, not stabilizing as the bottom_2024_aug analog requires

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
